title: Nine Inch Nails Reveal New Collaborative LP with Boys Noize
author: Christian Eede
summary:
Halo 38, released under the joint name Nine Inch Noize, is out this month

Nine Inch Nails are releasing a collaborative album with Boys Noize under the name Nine Inch Noize.

Titled Halo 38, its release this month will coincide with the two acts' first live shows together under the Nine Inch Noize banner, which are scheduled to take place at Coachella festival. A billboard advertising the collaboration was spotted in Indio, California where the event will take place this weekend and next.

Boys Noize, real name Alexander Ridha, recently contributed to Nine Inch Nails' TRON: Ares soundtrack remix album, TRON Ares: Divergence. Ridha also supported the band on tour last year and early this year.

Interscope will release Halo 38 on 17 April...

The post
full_text:
Nine Inch Nails Reveal New Collaborative LP with Boys Noize
 
 

 

Halo 38, released under the joint name Nine Inch Noize, is out this month
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

Nine Inch Nails are releasing a collaborative album with Boys Noize under the name Nine Inch Noize.

Titled Halo 38, its release this month will coincide with the two acts’ first live shows together under the Nine Inch Noize banner, which are scheduled to take place at Coachella festival. A billboard advertising the collaboration was spotted in Indio, California where the event will take place this weekend and next.

Boys Noize, real name Alexander Ridha, recently contributed to Nine Inch Nails’ TRON: Ares soundtrack remix album, TRON Ares: Divergence. Ridha also supported the band on tour last year and early this year.

Interscope will release Halo 38 on 17 April 2026.
